description: PCOMJR Terminal Registry — maps every TalonSight terminal to its ontological domain.

CIAS.name: Creative Infrastructure As a Subscription
CIAS.description: Terminals that produce domain-specific creative artifacts. Creators subscribe to governed AI creative tools that remember their work, improve with use, and produce verifiable output.

OIAS.name: Organizational Infrastructure As a Subscription
OIAS.description: Platform systems that operate on the organizational meta-layer. Organizations subscribe to an intelligence layer that captures decisions, preserves knowledge, verifies work, and shows how everything connects.

terminals.name: Sonic Genesis
terminals.description: AI music generation platform — Loop Studio, Flow Mode, Lyria integration, stem separation.

terminals.name: Da Cypher
terminals.description: Freestyle rap training — Lyric Mode, Career Mode, five-signal progression engine, coaching dashboard.

terminals.name: TalonVision
terminals.description: Visual/comic generation — Nano Banana architecture, script-first workflow, outfit consistency, Location Sheets.

terminals.name: TalonMotion
terminals.description: Video/animation — consumes TalonVisionExport v1.0, output artifact pipeline, POW session provenance.

terminals.name: TalonFly
terminals.description: Creator marketplace — purchase flow, provenance page, earnings dashboard, Afro-futuristic design system.

terminals.name: TalonLearn
terminals.description: Educational content — curriculum system, POW emission layer, TalonLearnExport v1.0.

terminals.name: Artifact Memory
terminals.description: Knowledge graph — ingests transcripts, extracts artifacts, D3 constellation visualization, session briefs.

terminals.name: Decision Intelligence OS
terminals.description: Decision capture and analysis — Context/Evidence loop, pattern detection, workflow proposals.

terminals.name: POW Ledger
terminals.description: Verification and proof — SHA-256 sealing, single-writer Capture Agent, immutable ledger, pattern-to-workflow pipeline.

agents.name: Capture Agent
agents.role: Single-writer — only agent that mutates the ledger

agents.name: Verification Agent
agents.role: Reads independently, verifies integrity, detects patterns

terminals.name: Talon Agent
terminals.description: Mastra-based agent orchestration — event claiming, atomic transactions, cross-terminal coordination.

relationships.description: Named relationships in the ontology and their cardinality constraints.

edges.name: derivedFrom
edges.description: Provenance chain — what this artifact was built from.

edges.name: hasContext
edges.description: Every decision must preserve at least one context.

edges.name: supportedBy
edges.description: Every decision must cite at least one piece of evidence.

edges.name: references
edges.description: Evidence must reference at least one existing artifact.

edges.name: verifies
edges.description: Each verification proves exactly one artifact.

edges.name: recordedIn
edges.description: Each verification is recorded in exactly one ledger entry.

edges.name: detectedIn
edges.description: A pattern requires at least two matching decisions.

edges.name: proposes
edges.description: A pattern may propose one reusable workflow.

edges.name: produces
edges.description: Each terminal produces at least one artifact type.

edges.name: emitsTo
edges.description: Every terminal emits to the Memory Bus.

edges.name: belongsTo
edges.description: Every artifact belongs to exactly one workspace.

pcomjrMapping.description: How the PCOMJR pipeline stages map to ontological layers.

stages.governs: How work flows between terminals and systems.
Conditions under which decisions are made.
Who routes what — agent identity and authority.
What can reason — model selection and constraints.
What was decided — the Decision entity.
What was produced — the base Artifact and all subclasses.
Can we verify it — Verification, LedgerEntry, integrity.
